title: calorophus flexuosus
intro: Calorophus flexuosus, also known as the Mexican gold poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Mexican folk medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calorophus flexuosus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of infections. Herbal preparations of Calorophus flexuosus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
